assertion_results.text: Each task file contains all required template sections: Repository, Target Branch, Description, at least one of Files to Modify or Files to Create, Implementation Notes, Acceptance Criteria, Test Requirements
assertion_results.evidence: All 5 task files (task-1-advisory-summary-model.md through task-5-integration-tests.md) contain every required section: ## Repository, ## Target Branch, ## Description, at least one of ## Files to Modify or ## Files to Create, ## Implementation Notes, ## Acceptance Criteria, ## Test Requirements.

assertion_results.text: Task count is between 3 and 10 inclusive
assertion_results.evidence: There are exactly 5 task files: task-1-advisory-summary-model.md, task-2-advisory-summary-service.md, task-3-advisory-summary-endpoint.md, task-4-cache-invalidation.md, task-5-integration-tests.md. 5 is between 3 and 10 inclusive.
Every task file has '## Repository' followed by 'trustify-backend': task-1 line 3-4, task-2 line 3-4, task-3 line 3-4, task-4 line 3-4, task-5 line 3-4.

assertion_results.text: Task dependencies form a DAG with no circular dependencies
assertion_results.evidence: Dependency graph: Task 1 has no dependencies; Task 2 depends on Task 1; Task 3 depends on Task 2; Task 4 depends on Task 3; Task 5 depends on Task 3. This forms a DAG (1 -> 2 -> 3 -> 4, 3 -> 5) with no cycles.

assertion_results.text: Every task's Files to Modify and Files to Create reference paths plausible within the repo-backend.md structure
assertion_results.evidence: All modified files exist in repo-backend.md manifest: modules/fundamental/src/sbom/model/mod.rs, modules/fundamental/src/sbom/service/sbom.rs, modules/fundamental/src/sbom/service/mod.rs, modules/fundamental/src/sbom/endpoints/mod.rs, modules/ingestor/src/graph/advisory/mod.rs, tests/api/sbom.rs. All created files are in directories that exist in the manifest: modules/fundamental/src/sbom/model/advisory_summary.rs (alongside summary.rs and details.rs), modules/fundamental/src/sbom/endpoints/advisory_summary.rs (alongside list.rs and get.rs), tests/api/sbom_advisory_summary.rs (alongside sbom.rs and advisory.rs).

assertion_results.text: Impact map lists concrete, specific changes (not vague or abstract descriptions)
assertion_results.evidence: Impact map (impact-map.md) includes: specific file paths with exact purposes (e.g., 'modules/fundamental/src/sbom/model/advisory_summary.rs' for 'AdvisorySeveritySummary response struct with fields: critical, high, medium, low, total'), specific change descriptions for modified files (e.g., 'Add pub mod advisory_summary; to expose the new model'), named entity layer files with no-change justification, a concrete dependency graph, and specific risk assessment items.

assertion_results.text: Every generated task description contains a Repository section with a single repository name (not multiple repos per task)
assertion_results.evidence: All 5 tasks have '## Repository' followed by only 'trustify-backend' on the next line. No task lists multiple repositories.

assertion_results.text: Every generated task description contains Target Branch, Description, Acceptance Criteria, and Test Requirements sections as required by the handoff contract in task-description-template.md
assertion_results.evidence: All 5 tasks contain: '## Target Branch' (task-1 line 6, task-2 line 6, task-3 line 6, task-4 line 6, task-5 line 6), '## Description' (task-1 line 9, task-2 line 9, task-3 line 9, task-4 line 9, task-5 line 9), '## Acceptance Criteria' (task-1 line 26, task-2 line 32, task-3 line 41, task-4 line 28, task-5 line 32), '## Test Requirements' (task-1 line 33, task-2 line 39, task-3 line 50, task-4 line 36, task-5 line 38).

assertion_results.text: File paths in Files to Modify and Files to Create reference paths from the repo-backend.md mock repository structure manifest, not invented paths
assertion_results.evidence: All modified files appear in the repo-backend.md directory tree: modules/fundamental/src/sbom/model/mod.rs (line 41), modules/fundamental/src/sbom/service/sbom.rs (line 46), modules/fundamental/src/sbom/service/mod.rs (line 45), modules/fundamental/src/sbom/endpoints/mod.rs (line 48), modules/ingestor/src/graph/advisory/mod.rs (line 83), tests/api/sbom.rs (line 111). Created files are new but placed in directories from the manifest: model/ alongside summary.rs/details.rs, endpoints/ alongside list.rs/get.rs, tests/api/ alongside sbom.rs/advisory.rs.

assertion_results.text: Implementation Notes in every task reference specific file paths and code patterns from the repository, not abstract or generic guidance
assertion_results.evidence: Task 1: references 'modules/fundamental/src/sbom/model/summary.rs (SbomSummary)' and 'modules/fundamental/src/sbom/model/details.rs (SbomDetails)'. Task 2: references 'modules/fundamental/src/sbom/service/sbom.rs', SeaORM 'Entity::find()' and '.context()' patterns. Task 3: references 'modules/fundamental/src/sbom/endpoints/get.rs', handler pattern 'Path(id)' and 'Json(result)'. Task 4: references 'modules/ingestor/src/graph/advisory/mod.rs', 'sbom_advisory' table insertion points, tower-http cache patterns. Task 5: references 'tests/api/sbom.rs' and 'tests/api/advisory.rs', 'assert_eq!(resp.status(), StatusCode::OK)' pattern.

assertion_results.text: Every generated task description contains a Target Branch section set to 'main'
assertion_results.evidence: All 5 tasks have '## Target Branch' followed by 'main': task-1 line 7, task-2 line 7, task-3 line 7, task-4 line 7, task-5 line 7.

assertion_results.text: After each task is created, a description digest comment is posted with a format-tagged SHA-256 hash — exactly 64 lowercase hex characters prefixed by 'sha256-md:' or 'sha256-adf:', not a placeholder, abbreviated value, or example string. Marker format: '[sdlc-workflow] Description digest: sha256-md:<64-char-hex>' (or sha256-adf). The digest is computed by re-fetching the description from the API and running scripts/sha256-digest.py
assertion_results.evidence: All 5 tasks end with a digest line matching the required format. Task 1: 'sha256-md:4eed90f1d100cda8230c88f6525edb4af3a36e374d9f7eac5344bfeae6b8fd22' (64 hex chars). Task 2: 'sha256-md:ab03e3570472c449324e80fe9880800940e45ce5880011149b1a1e6aa28e4e42' (64 hex chars). Task 3: 'sha256-md:6c6ea2546d3b4b81219743f254535234ab2be280cea34491374d7819751bb46e' (64 hex chars). Task 4: 'sha256-md:7c02b03fec0f24f681fdb13151ec568f4533ac6483d6e53078a010707803d7f4' (64 hex chars). Task 5: 'sha256-md:693689e894a5c12590410abf5d78d0d9e5f4bab00e58df25edfb9b83b2f074ac' (64 hex chars). All are lowercase hex, prefixed with 'sha256-md:', and use the marker format '[sdlc-workflow] Description digest:'.

assertion_results.text: Convention-aware enrichment validates file-type applicability per shared/convention-applicability-rules.md before including a convention — inapplicable conventions are excluded entirely (not listed with 'Not applicable' annotations), and applicable ones include a rationale in the prescribed format ('Applies: task modifies <file> matching the convention's <scope>'), not free-form prose
assertion_results.evidence: All convention rationales follow the prescribed format. Task 1: 'Applies: task creates modules/fundamental/src/sbom/model/advisory_summary.rs matching the convention's .rs module file scope.' Task 2: 'Applies: task modifies modules/fundamental/src/sbom/service/sbom.rs matching the convention's .rs file scope.' (two conventions). Task 3: four conventions all with 'Applies: task creates/modifies <specific file> matching the convention's <scope>'. Task 4: two conventions with prescribed format rationales. Task 5: 'Applies: task creates tests/api/sbom_advisory_summary.rs matching the convention's tests/api/ directory scope.' No tasks contain 'Not applicable' annotations. All conventions included are applicable to .rs files in the respective task's file lists. No inapplicable conventions are listed.
